text.tspan: Level 2 - Session Runtime (HTTP commands plus WebSocket live updates)
and served from nginx. It creates
the gateway, then subscribes to live
frontend API calls for game creation,
and opening lookup to the backend
games and sessions. This is the
modular backend rather than a set
server used for live session updates
GUI/console play. It can also join
moves over HTTP, and subscribe to
live updates over WebSocket. Part of
the repository, but not part of
